verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Day and night, night and day, let incense rise Day and night, night and day, let incense rise Day and night, night and day, let incense rise Day and night, night and day, e-yeah!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are worthy of it all You are worthy of it all (oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh) For from You are all things (oh-oh-oh) And to You are all things (oh-oh-oh) You deserve the glory (oh-oh-oh) Just a voice say, "You are worthy"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are worthy of it all You are worthy of it all (yes, Lord) For from You are all things And to You are all things But you deserve the glory
